query:
SELECT skill_id, name, category, wuxing FROM game_skill_catalog 
WHERE name IN ('木行拳', '春風愈傈', '根脆之力', '烈焰拳', '爆烎衝波', '火行催化', '山岳拳', '大地護盾', '山岳之體', '利金拳', '穿雲一擊', '銀月洞察', '水流拳', '流水貊潏', '流水感知');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT skill_id, name, category, wuxing FROM game_skill_catalog 
WHERE name IN ('木行拳', '春風愈傈', '根脆之力', '烈焰拳', '爆烎衝波', '火行催化', '山岳拳', '大地護盾', '山岳之體', '利金拳', '穿雲一擊', '銀月洞察', '水流拳', '流水貊潏', '流水感知');
